reviews.review_description: It's a free game but it's nowhere close to Audio Trip or Synth Riders in terms of quality or fun. Update: Based off of the other reviews and the description above, it's actually a boxing game (then why is it called Dance Loop?). The game intro didn't make that clear at all as you are for the most part just thrown into the start menu without a tutorial. However, there's also better boxing games out there as well. But for being free, I'll still give it 3 out of 5 stars.

We really enjoy this game, however the loop isn't always within the boundary we set so have to come out of it to get the balls. 
I had to move the boundary to get more room, however the direction from where they come from doesn't change and did not come into the new boundary area so a restart of the whole game is required until it comes from the right direction and within the boundary. This can be up to 3 times so an option to move where they come from would be really useful.

Thank you, programmers, developers, and everyone who participated in creating an app that's  exciting, energizing , and yeah, a great app to get you exercising and the heart pumping.  I absolutely love it love it love it!!
I’ve only had my meta quest 3 for about a week and I thought I really should try and move more, maybe a dance game. Not only is this one free but it’s super fun and I’m loving the music 😍
This is a knockoff beat saber I like the songs and workouts but it only has 20 levels(10 hard mode) and it is also very glitchy. Very confusing too.

Really enjoyed playing this game on my Meta Quest 3. I've tried about 4 songs so far, and it works whether I'm standing or sitting. Greatly appreciated the workout! The best part is that Dance Loop is a free game. Thanks, developers!
I really love this game, completes my daily workout. The music is great but please add some more tracks! I want some more music packs! Highly recommended!

I played it, and enjoyed it immensely. Not only gives you a real "gym training" , it makes you sweat. And it's free!!!  The graphics could be polished a little more. I got so much into the game that every time I didn't push or catch some element, I wanted a pause and rewind button to preform better.
Fun, free, what else I could ask? Thanks to the developers!!! Your thunderbirds are go!

It's a great fitness game, especially as it's free. Perfect for a quick stretch out in the middle of everything too.
I don't know if it's just me, but after my Q3 updated to v.62, the game view has become kind of unsteady. When I move my head, the envirinment wobbles and and I see everything double. It's still playable, but hopefully gets fixed.
After some glitches this is back, loving it!

reviews.review_title: We have Synth riders at home
reviews.review_description:
Plays like a sterile version of synth riders.
Not many songs and none of them matched my tastes. 
More content and a bit more polish needed.
For free it's absolutely fine.
Recently got the game, quite fun. I enjoy it. I never knew it was a fitness game but thats great. I suck at the game but great game

reviews.review_title: Gets you into the flow state
reviews.review_description:
I can't believe how that game feels complete and is free. It brings me into a flow state very quickly and lets me dance with the beat while i hit the balls. I love that it is basically a whole body workout because the arms and shoulders are always involved and often times you need to squat down or switch from one side to the other and Back again.

I just need one more song on hard in S+. But i am still chasing my own record and the higher ranks in the leaderboard. 

I can totally recommend this game. It is free so just get it and have fun!
This is a great workout!  Love the beats... gives me a better workout than Beat Saber!

Definitely one of the best rhyme games out there, especially considering that its free!
Nice and fun way to close my daily cardio goals in the end of the day.
Would be great to see more tracks in different styles in future. Neuro Fusion Drive is my personal favorite.

First, thank you developers for this fun exercise game, I enjoyed playing it very much.
Please continue to add more if possible. 
Yes, I do recommend this game for everyone to enjoy. Thank you very much
Game looks and plays really well but I played through all the levels quickly
Love this rhythm game! Minimalist design, easy to learn and play, yet challenging.
This application is useful for adding variety to your daily workouts. It's definitely worth it because it's free!
It’s a fun game,easy,and free!
